name: Origami Comic Style
description: A unique comic style that transforms characters and panels into folded paper art, emphasizing sharp angles and geometric shapes, reminiscent of intricate origami techniques.

art_style.line_styles: Use thin, crisp lines with sharp angles to outline characters and elements, mimicking the folds of paper. Maintain a clean and precise quality to enhance the geometric aesthetic.
art_style.inking_tools: Primarily digital tools for precision, but traditional fineliners can be used for texture. Avoid heavy inking to keep the lightness of the paper feel.
art_style.shading_style: Utilize layered paper textures for shadows, focusing on subtle gradients created by overlapping colors to enhance the 3D effect. No harsh shadows; aim for soft transitions.
art_style.color_palette: Natural hues of paper such as beige, off-white, light browns, and pastel tones to reflect the colors of unprinted origami. Avoid bright colors to maintain a subtle aesthetic.
art_style.registration: Ensure precise alignment of color layers to maintain the clean look of folded paper. Tolerances should be minimal to avoid misalignment of edges.
art_style.lettering_style: Use a clean, sans-serif font that mimics the simplicity of origami, with slight curves to reflect the paper's texture.

character_style.head_to_body_ratio: 1:5 for a stylized, elongated appearance that emphasizes geometric forms.
character_style.limb_proportions: Long and slender limbs to enhance the angularity of the origami theme.
character_style.anatomy_detail: Minimalistic detail; focus on clear shapes and folds rather than realistic musculature.
character_style.eye_style: Simple geometric shapes, like triangles or circles, to emphasize expressiveness in a stylized manner.
character_style.nose_style: Subtle, angular shapes that blend seamlessly with the character's geometric design.
character_style.mouth_style: Basic lines or curves, keeping expressions minimal yet clear.
character_style.expression_exaggeration: Moderate exaggeration for emotional clarity while maintaining geometric integrity.
character_style.silhouette_clarity: Very high; ensure characters stand out distinctly against backgrounds.
character_style.silhouette_shape_language: Angular and geometric to reflect the origami aesthetic.
character_style.detail_complexity: Flat shapes with minimal folds; focus on layering for depth instead of intricate details.
character_style.texture_accents: Incorporate light textures that suggest paper grain or fold patterns, without overwhelming the design.
character_style.motion_line_style: Use angular motion lines that reflect paper folds, emphasizing direction and speed.
character_style.expression_line_style: Subtle accent lines around facial features to indicate emotion without cluttering the geometric forms.
character_style.signature_motifs: Folding patterns or creases as recurring motifs in backgrounds and character designs.
character_style.recurring_flourishes: Occasional use of layered paper effects in backgrounds to enhance depth and visual interest.

chat.shape: Rounded rectangles with sharp corners, resembling folded paper.
chat.border: Thin, crisp borders that mimic the edges of paper.
chat.fill_color: Light beige or off-white to maintain the origami theme.
chat.font: Simple sans-serif font with slight curvature to reflect the softness of paper.

whisper.shape: Softly curved rectangles to suggest quietness, mimicking gentle folds.
whisper.border: Dotted line to represent delicate paper edges.
whisper.font: Slightly italicized sans-serif for a softer tone.

shout.shape: Angular burst shapes to reflect excitement, resembling torn paper edges.
shout.border: Thicker, jagged border to convey loudness.
shout.fill_color: Pale pastel hue for emphasis without overpowering the design.
shout.font: Bold sans-serif, large size for visibility.

thought.shape: Cloud-like shapes with soft curves, reminiscent of floating paper.
thought.border: Thin, smooth border to maintain lightness.
thought.fill_color: Light pastel tint to indicate thoughtfulness.
thought.font: Curvy sans-serif for a whimsical feel.

sound_effect.shape: Dynamic, jagged shapes to convey action, mimicking torn paper.
sound_effect.border: Thick and bold to emphasize sound intensity.
sound_effect.fill_color: Subtle beige or light color for integration with the background.
sound_effect.font: Bold, playful font to grab attention.

narration.shape: Rectangular boxes with slightly rounded corners, resembling folded pages.
narration.border: Thin, crisp border to maintain consistency.
narration.fill_color: Soft cream to blend with the paper theme.
